title: codereview-P2: post-loop check for both fields missing after adding vars
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/meshtastic/adapter.c now has flags but no logic yet to use them to set MALFORMED if (has_decoded && has_encrypted). The check must be added after the while loop before return 0 to catch any order of fields. This is the core of the fix for project-LICHEN-e4so. P2 correctness.
